command.pvptrainingbot.bot.help:
§6=== PvP Training Bot Commands (Dual-Mace & Ender Pearl Grapple Edition) ===§r
§e/bot spawn <username> [mode] [difficulty] §7- Spawn a training bot mimicking <username>§r
§e/bot mode <mace|axe_shield|crystal|sword> §7- Set combat mode (Primary mode: Mace)§r
§e/bot difficulty <easy|medium|hard|god|insane> §7- Set AI speed and accuracy§r
§e/bot tech <tech_name|all> <on|off|trigger> §7- Configure or trigger any of the 20 transcript tech§r
§e/bot listtech §7- List all 20 Mace PvP techniques from the transcript§r
§e/bot gear <reset|mace_kit|custom> §7- Equip dual-mace competitive kit (Aerial Density+WB1 & Ground Breach IV)§r
§e/bot behavior <aggressive|tactical|kiting|passive> §7- Set positioning strategy§r
§e/bot target <player_name|nearest> §7- Assign sparring target§r
§e/bot status §7- View active bot statistics and tech state§r
§e/bot remove <all|username> §7- Remove training bots§r
